title: In Search of an Easy Problem

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "In Search of an Easy Problem". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1030/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains a single integer n. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print 'Easy' if the number 1 is present in the array, otherwise print 'Hard'.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
